channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Krebs on Security, The Hacker News, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading

item.title: Iran-Linked Hackers Breach FBI Director’s Personal Email, Hit Stryker With Wiper Attack
item.description: Threat actors with ties to Iran successfully broke into the personal email account of Kash Patel, the director of the U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), and leaked a cache of photos and other...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: New Infinity Stealer malware grabs macOS data via ClickFix lures
item.description: A new info-stealing malware named Infinity Stealer is targeting macOS systems with a Python payload packaged as an executable using the open-source Nuitka compiler. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Citrix NetScaler Under Active Recon for CVE-2026-3055 (CVSS 9.3) Memory Overread Bug
item.description: A recently disclosed critical security flaw impacting Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway is witnessing active reconnaissance activity, according to Defused Cyber and watchTowr. The vulnerabili...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: CISA Adds CVE-2025-53521 to KEV After Active F5 BIG-IP APM Exploitation
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Friday added a critical security flaw impacting F5 BIG-IP Access Policy Manager (APM) to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) c...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: TA446 Deploys DarkSword iOS Exploit Kit in Targeted Spear-Phishing Campaign
item.description: Proofpoint has disclosed details of a targeted email campaign in which threat actors with ties to Russia are leveraging the recently disclosed DarkSword exploit kit to target iOS devices. The activity...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Backdoored Telnyx PyPI package pushes malware hidden in WAV audio
item.description: TeamPCP hackers compromised the Telnyx package on the Python Package Index today, uploading malicious versions that deliver credential-stealing malware hidden inside a WAV file. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Apple Sends Lock Screen Alerts to Outdated iPhones Over Active Web-Based Exploits
item.description: Apple is now sending Lock Screen notifications to iPhones and iPads running older versions of iOS and iPadOS to alert users of web-based attacks and urge them to install the update. The development wa...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: TeamPCP Pushes Malicious Telnyx Versions to PyPI, Hides Stealer in WAV Files
item.description: TeamPCP, the threat actor behind the supply chain attack targeting Trivy, KICS, and litellm, has now compromised the telnyx Python package by pushing two malicious versions to steal sensitive data. Th...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Fake VS Code alerts on GitHub spread malware to developers
item.description: A large-scale campaign is targeting developers on GitHub with fake Visual Studio Code (VS Code) security alerts posted in the Discussions section of various projects, to trick users into downloading m...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: China Upgrades the Backdoor It Uses to Spy on Telcos Globally
item.description: Chinese APT Red Menshen's super-advanced BPFdoor malware defeats traditional cybersecurity protections. All telcos can do, really, is try hunting it down....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Wartime Usage of Compromised IP Cameras Highlight Their Danger
item.description: The list of countries exploiting Internet-connected cameras to give them eyes inside their adversaries' borders continues to expand. What should companies look out for?...
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Agentic GRC: Teams Get the Tech. The Mindset Shift Is What's Missing.
item.description: Agentic GRC automates workflows, forcing teams to rethink their role beyond operations. Anecdotes explains why the biggest challenge is shifting from execution to risk leadership. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Open VSX Bug Let Malicious VS Code Extensions Bypass Pre-Publish Security Checks
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a now-patched bug impacting Open VSX's pre-publish scanning pipeline to cause the tool to allow a malicious Microsoft Visual Studio Code (VS Code) e...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Infrastructure Attacks With Physical Consequences Down 25%
item.description: Operational technology (OT) at industrial and critical infrastructure sites seem to have been benefitting from a lull in ransomware, and hackers' relative ignorance of OT systems....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Google Sets 2029 Deadline for Quantum-Safe Cryptography
item.description: The post-quantum future may be coming sooner than you think, as Google plans to have PQC migration in place by 2029....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: European Commission investigating breach after Amazon cloud account hack
item.description: The European Commission, the European Union's main executive body, is investigating a security breach after a threat actor gained access to the Commission's Amazon cloud environment. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: AitM Phishing Targets TikTok Business Accounts Using Cloudflare Turnstile Evasion
item.description: Threat actors are using adversary-in-the-middle (AitM) phishing pages to seize control of TikTok for Business accounts in a new campaign, according to a report from Push Security. Business accounts as...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: We Are At War
item.description: Rising geopolitical tensions are reflected (or in some cases preceded) by cyber operations, while technology itself has become politicized. Let’s admit it: we are in the middle of it. Introduction: O...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Anti-piracy coalition takes down AnimePlay app with 5 million users
item.description: The Alliance for Creativity and Entertainment (ACE) announced the shutdown of AnimePlay, a major anime streaming platform with over 5 million users. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Bearlyfy Hits Russian Firms with Custom GenieLocker Ransomware
item.description: A pro-Ukrainian group called Bearlyfy has been attributed to more than 70 cyber attacks targeting Russian companies since it first surfaced in the threat landscape in January 2025, with recent attacks...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Windows 11 KB5079391 update rolls out Smart App Control improvements
item.description: ​Microsoft has released the KB5079391 preview cumulative update for Windows 11 24H2 and 25H2, which includes 29 changes, such as Smart App Control and Display improvements. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Dutch Police discloses security breach after phishing attack
item.description: The Dutch National Police (Politie) says a security breach resulting from a successful phishing attack has had a limited impact and hasn't affected citizens' data. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: LangChain, LangGraph Flaws Expose Files, Secrets, Databases in Widely Used AI Frameworks
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed three security vulnerabilities impacting LangChain and LangGraph that, if successfully exploited, could expose filesystem data, environment secrets, and conver...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Ajax football club hack exposed fan data, enabled ticket hijack
item.description: Dutch professional football club Ajax Amsterdam (AFC Ajax) disclosed that a hacker exploited vulnerabilities in its IT systems and accessed data belonging to a few hundred people. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Coruna, DarkSword & Democratizing Nation-State Exploit Kits
item.description: Nation-state malware is being sold on the Dark Web and leaked to GitHub; and ordinary organizations might not stand much of a chance of defending themselves....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Is the FCC's Router Ban the Wrong Fix?
item.description: The agency put foreign-made consumer routers on its list of prohibited communications devices, but the ban could create more problems down the road....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Automotive Cybersecurity Threats Grow in Era of Connected, Autonomous Vehicles
item.description: More than a decade since the 2015 Jeep hack, the cybersecurity of vehicles remains of the utmost importance....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: CISA: New Langflow flaw actively exploited to hijack AI workflows
item.description: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) is warning that hackers are actively exploiting a critical vulnerability identified as CVE-2026-33017, which affects the Langflow framework ...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Critical Flaw in Langflow AI Platform Under Attack
item.description: Threats actors pounced on the code injection vulnerability within hours of its disclosure, demonstrating that organizations have little time to address critical bugs....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: China-Linked Red Menshen Uses Stealthy BPFDoor Implants to Spy via Telecom Networks
item.description: A long-term and ongoing campaign attributed to a China-nexus threat actor has embedded itself in telecom networks to conduct espionage against government networks. The strategic positioning activity, ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News
